overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, starting on an elevated highway near industrial power infrastructure, navigating through warehouse complexes, and transitioning into the desert Badlands with futuristic floating structures visible in the distance. The footage shows a continuous drive from urban-industrial to arid rural environments under clear skies.

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway toward an industrial complex with power transmission towers visible ahead

entered.detail: blue metal guardrail running along the left side of the elevated highway
tall metal lattice towers with power lines stretching across the industrial landscape
cluster of industrial buildings and smokestacks visible in the distance
hazy mountains forming the backdrop to the industrial zone

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving along an elevated highway. The dashboard and steering wheel are visible in the foreground. Ahead, an industrial complex with power transmission towers dominates the horizon, while mountains rise in the far distance. The road is clear with no other traffic visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse complex with loading areas

events.description: exits main highway and enters industrial warehouse complex with shipping containers
makes sharp left turn navigating through industrial yard with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial complex, making turns around warehouses and shipping containers

entered.detail: large green and gray industrial building with loading docks
stacked blue and red metal shipping containers in the yard
small guard booth structure at the industrial entrance
concrete wall with 'NO RE' graffiti visible

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway and enters an industrial warehouse zone characterized by stacked shipping containers, large warehouse buildings, and security infrastructure. The driver navigates through tight turns in the industrial yard, passing a security booth and graffiti-covered walls. The environment is enclosed by industrial structures with power lines overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between industrial and desert badlands

events.description: passes under industrial overpass leaving the warehouse district
landscape transitions from industrial to desert with Joshua trees appearing

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the industrial zone and onto the open desert highway, passing under an overpass

entered.detail: concrete and metal overpass bridge spanning the road
distinctive desert trees with spiky branches characteristic of the Badlands
futuristic hovering structures visible in the desert distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the industrial complex by passing under a concrete overpass, emerging into a transitional landscape where industrial infrastructure gives way to arid desert terrain. Joshua trees begin to appear along the roadside, and futuristic floating platforms become visible on the horizon. The road stretches ahead into the open desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert badlands highway with distant city views

events.description: vehicle takes a sharp left turn looking out at the desert landscape

agents.ego_description: cruising through the desert Badlands, navigating gentle curves while passing abandoned structures and desert vegetation

entered.detail: derelict fuel station structure with broken signage
futuristic city towers visible on the horizon against the mountains
tall cylindrical storage structures in the desert distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows open desert driving through the Badlands, with Joshua trees dotting the landscape and futuristic floating platforms visible in the distance. The road winds through arid terrain with mountains forming a dramatic backdrop. Abandoned structures like a derelict gas station appear roadside, while the distant Night City skyline is visible on the horizon. The vehicle maintains a steady cruise through this expansive desert environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a structured industrial highway into the expansive, arid wilderness of the Badlands. It begins from the cockpit of a futuristic vehicle cruising along an elevated road toward a horizon of power transmission towers and distant mountains. As the vehicle exits the highway, the open road narrows into a dense industrial warehouse zone, weaving through tight turns past stacked shipping containers, security booths, and graffiti-covered walls. The scene then shifts as the car passes under a concrete overpass, where the enclosed industrial architecture gives way to a transitional landscape dotted with Joshua trees and futuristic floating platforms. Finally, the environment opens fully into the desert, winding past derelict roadside structures and mountains toward the distant skyline of Night City.
